name: Mincemeat (Real Meat) #2
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large kettle, combine the beef, suet, brown sugar, molasses, cider, currents, citron and raisins. Cook slowly over low heat until the sugar and citron melt.
2. Add the prepared apples to the mincemeat and cook until the apples are tender.
3. Add the remaining ingredients and stir until well mixed.
